resource.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

rateLimit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.

guild.forbidden: You do not have access to this server.

leaderboard.aliasConflict: The leaderboard alias is already in use.
leaderboard.invalidSeason: The requested season is not available on this leaderboard.

permissions.nullRole: Roles must not contain null entries.
permissions.duplicateRole: Duplicate role IDs are not allowed.
permissions.roleNotInGuild: The role does not belong to this server.
permissions.modulesRequired: Module IDs are required for the role.
permissions.duplicateModule: Duplicate module IDs are not allowed for the role.
permissions.revisionConflict: Role permissions changed since they were loaded. Reload and try again.

settings.groupsRequired: All XP setting groups are required.
settings.collectionsRequired: All XP rule collections are required.
settings.messageCooldown: Message cooldown must not be negative.
settings.voicePoints: Voice XP values must not be negative.
settings.eventInterest: Event interest XP must not be negative.
settings.channelMultipliers: Channel multipliers require unique channels and non-negative values.
settings.levelRoles: Level roles require unique roles and positive levels.

import.guildMismatch: The MEE6 export belongs to another server.
import.invalidPlayers: The MEE6 players export is invalid.

season.invalidTimeZone: The season time zone is invalid.
season.invalidSchedule: The season schedule or naming template is invalid.
season.invalidTransition: The requested season status transition is not allowed.
season.activeConflict: Another season is already active for this server.
season.planConflict: The requested seasons overlap with the existing plan.
season.notResumable: This season can only be resumed during its original time range.

selfRoles.tooManyMappings: A self-role panel supports at most 20 mappings.
selfRoles.duplicateEmoji: Each self-role mapping must use a unique emoji.
selfRoles.roleNotManageable: The selected role cannot be managed by the bot.
selfRoles.channelNotUsable: The selected channel cannot receive self-role messages.
selfRoles.discordPermissions: The bot is missing permissions in this channel. Grant View Channel, Send Messages, Embed Links, Add Reactions, Read Message History, and Manage Messages.
selfRoles.emojiInvalid: A self-role mapping contains an invalid emoji.
selfRoles.revisionConflict: The self-role panel changed since it was loaded. Reload and try again.
